notes: Use HTTP (/mcp) as primary transport; SSE (/sse) is a fallback for clients that need it.
Authenticate via OAuth when your MCP-capable client prompts (Cursor, Claude Desktop, ChatGPT MCP, etc.).
For strict STDIO-only clients, wrap the hosted server with mcp-remote: { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "mcp-remote", "https://mcp.notion.com/mcp"] }
